name: Events
summary: The Events class allows the user to register event listeners for model events.
remarks: Asynchronous event handling Registered event handlers are called asynchronously so that many handlers may be running simultaneously. Event handlers are not guaranteed to be run in the same thread where they were registered. The asynchronous nature of the events requires the use of synchronization constructs on objects and data structures that are not defined to be thread safe.Microsoft's documentation about the lock statement: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/c5kehkcz.aspxMicrosoft's documentation about delegates: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/900fyy8e.aspxMicrosoft's documentation about managed threading: http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/1c9txz50.aspx

methods.name: OnModelSaveInfo
methods.signature: public void OnModelSaveInfo(string eventName, params Object[] parameters)

params.name: parameters
params.doc: Event parameters. Contains the code which specifies the reason of the save action.

methods.name: Register
methods.summary: Registers the instance to listen to the specified events. More event delegates should not be added without calling UnRegister first.

methods.name: UnRegister
methods.summary: Unregisters the instance from listening to events.

events.name: AnnotationSelectionChange
events.summary: The SelectionChange event is raised when the user changes the current selection of an annotation inside Tekla Structures.

events.name: ClashCheckDone
events.summary: The ClashCheckDone event is raised just after clash check is completed.

events.name: ClashDetected
events.summary: The ClashDetected event is raised just after the detection of each clash. The clash information is saved before the event is triggered.

events.name: ClipPlaneChanged
events.summary: Occurs when user deletes a clip plane.

events.name: CommandStatusChange
events.summary: The CommandStatusChange event is raised when a command is started/ended.

events.name: HiddenObjectsChanged
events.summary: Occurs when user hides an object or view is redrawn

events.name: Interrupted
events.summary: Occurs when user interrupts.

events.name: ModelChanged
events.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use the new ModelObjectChanged event instead.")] public event Events.ModelChangedDelegate ModelChanged
events.summary: The ModelChanged event is raised just after some changes have been made to the model. Note, this event is however not triggered when UNDO or REDO are performed.

events.name: ModelLoad
events.summary: The ModelLoad event is raised just after a model has been loaded.

events.name: ModelLoadInfo
events.summary: The ModelLoadInfo event is raised just after a model has been loaded with the model load information as a string parameter.

events.name: ModelObjectChanged
events.summary: The ModelObjectChanged event is raised just after some changes have been made to the model objects. Note, this event is triggered when UNDO or REDO are performed!!

events.name: ModelObjectNumbered
events.summary: The ModelObjectNumbered event is raised when model object is numbered.

events.name: ModelSave
events.summary: The ModelSave event is raised just after a model has been saved.

events.name: ModelSaveAs
events.summary: The ModelSaveAs event is raised just after a model has been saved using save as.

events.name: ModelSaveInfo
events.summary: The ModelSave event is raised just after a model has been saved with the model save information as a string parameter.

events.name: ModelUnloading
events.summary: The ModelUnloading event is raised just before the model is unloaded.

events.name: ModelUnloadingSync
events.summary: The ModelUnloadingSync event is raised synchronously on the main thread just before the model is unloaded. Use this event only when core resources need be cleaned up before the model unloading proceeds. All UI-only related resource cleanup should be done in the async ModelUnloading event. OnModelUnloadingSync(String, .Object[])

events.name: Numbering
events.summary: The Numbering event is raised just after a model has been numbered.

events.name: ProjectInfoChanged
events.summary: The ProjectInfoChanged event is raised just after some changes have been made to the project info. Note, this event is however not triggered when UNDO or REDO are performed.

events.name: SelectionChange
events.summary: The SelectionChange event is raised when the user changes the current selection inside Tekla Structures.

events.name: TeklaStructuresExit
events.summary: The TeklaStructuresExit event is raised just before Tekla Structures exits. After this event has been called the user will no longer be able to perform any calls to Tekla Structures.

events.name: TemporaryStatesChanged
events.summary: Occurs when temporary states are changed.

events.name: UndoClicked
events.summary: Occurs when user clicks undo.

events.name: ViewCameraChanged
events.summary: Occurs when view camera is changed.

events.name: ViewClosed
events.summary: Occurs when view is closed.
